title: Luxurious 3BR near Bishan MRT — the Catchment Dream
raw_copy: Welcome to this spacious 3-bedroom condo nestled in the heart of Bishan, a dream for families seeking both connectivity and tranquility. Just a 5 min walk to Bishan MRT interchange makes commuting a breeze, while a 12 min drive to Raffles Place gets you into the CBD in no time. Located on a quiet residential road, mornings here are refreshingly peaceful. Enjoy unobstructed greenery views over Bishan-Ang Mo Kio Park. Surrounded by amenities: supermarkets, clinics, and eateries all within 5 minutes on foot. Families will love the proximity to top primary schools — Catholic High and Ai Tong are within easy walking distance. 1,119 sqft of airy, thoughtful layout. Priced at S$1,680,000 — move-in ready.

claims.raw_text: 5 min walk to Bishan MRT interchange
Located on a quiet residential road
unobstructed greenery views over Bishan-Ang Mo Kio Park
supermarkets, clinics, and eateries all within 5 minutes on foot
